task_completion.description: Open the source expense report document
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open, displaying the 'expense_report_q1.docx' document with the expense table visible.

task_completion.description: Calculate 'Q1 Total' for each category row
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Q1 Total' column cells contain the calculated values: 3334, 10550, 16800, 5600, 9950, and 1201 (tolerance +/- 2).

task_completion.description: Calculate 'Monthly Total' for each month column
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Monthly Total' row cells contain the calculated values for January (21490), February (11244), and March (14701) (tolerance +/- 2).

task_completion.description: Calculate the Grand Total in the bottom-right cell
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom-right cell of the table contains the grand total value of 47435 (tolerance +/- 2).

task_completion.description: Apply bold formatting to the 'Monthly Total' row
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text and numerical values in the 'Monthly Total' row are visibly formatted in bold text.

task_completion.description: Save the completed document with the new filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog is used to save the file as 'expense_report_q1_complete.docx', or the application title bar shows the new filename.

integrity.description: Agent used a graphical word processor to edit the document
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen interacting with a graphical word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to view and edit the document, rather than using terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent used the table formula feature instead of manual entry
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the word processor's formula feature (e.g., opening the formula bar by pressing F2 or selecting Table -> Formula) to compute the totals, rather than just typing the numbers manually.

integrity.description: Agent saved the document using the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses the GUI 'Save As' functionality to save the new document, rather than copying or renaming the file via the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Expected values for the table calculations (tolerance +/- 2):
- Row totals ('Q1 Total' column): 3334, 10550, 16800, 5600, 9950, 1201.
- Column totals ('Monthly Total' row): January: 21490, February: 11244, March: 14701.
- Grand Total (bottom-right cell): 47435.
